title: CHART-Infographics: Chart and Infographic Analysis
description: Chart and infographic analysis with structured extraction. Annotators identify chart elements (axes, legends, data points, titles) with bounding boxes, classify chart types, and extract data values. Supports structured understanding of visual data representations.
citation:

    booktitle = "Proceedings of the 27th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR)",
    year = "2024",
    publisher = "Springer",
    url = "https://link.springer.com/chapter/10.1007/978-3-031-78312-8_5"
